arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs Holstein Kiel preview: Eagles look to get back to winning ways
arts.sum: Third-placed Eintracht Frankfurt aim to end their run of three successive draws as they host strugglers Holstein Kiel.

arts.ttl: Preview: Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Holstein Kiel - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Bundesliga clash between Eintracht Frankfurt and Holstein Kiel, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
